title: Godachi - Online Jewellery Store
description: Godachi is e-commerce system, this is developed best javascript technologies.  Backend: node.js, express.js, Frontend: Next.js, React.js UI: Ant design, Tailwindcss db: Mongodb.
keywords: Jewellery Online Store, Jewellery Ecommerce, Jewellery India
return_policy:
Return, Exchange & Cancellation Policy

Godachi is committed to ensure customer satisfaction with respect to the products available on our website or apps. Godachi at its sole discretion, reserves the rights to cancel an order. Our exchange facility is not yet activated. If for any reason you're not satisfied with the delivered items, you may return the order and place fresh order of choice. The product must be tag intact, in unused condition, in its original packaging along with its original tags, certificates and invoice, failing which refund may not be possible.

The online order can be cancelled due to inaccuracies or errors in product or pricing information by login to the godachi.com or apps anytime before shipping. The partial or full order return request can be placed by login within 5 days of the delivery due to quality, defective piece, size variation or any other valid reason. The refund process shall be initiated on receiving back of items in godachi ware house for both cass of prepayment or COD. In case of online prepayment, the amount will be credited back to the customer's same source account within the nominal processing time of minimum 3-7 working days.

In case of COD (Cash on delivery i.e. when customer pays in cash once the product is received) the amount can be refunded in the customers wallet or through online transfer on receiving of your valid bank account with IFSC code by message through registered mobile number or through registered email at the time of return request to process your refund.

The cancellation policy is not applicable for Customized ornaments, Gold Coin, Silver Coin, Gift vouchers, Gift Cards and digital gift vouchers or coupon codes. Any kind of exchange or cancellation of online orders will not be accepted at our stores.
shipping_policy:
Shipping Policy

Godachi provides free delivery/shipping of all items within India on the basis of minimum order value. Our delivery duration depends on the product selected, Locations and the shipping address. Customer needs to enter the correct details of Consignee / Recipient Name (as stated in their photo identification issued by the Government of India) with complete Address, nearby landmark, pin code, e mail, and contact numbers for hassle free delivery. The order shall be dispatch through any of the courier partners or their associates depending upon their serviceability in the shipping address. Orders can be delivered only to Consignee / Recipient’s Residential or Work Location. The delivery of the orders cannot be done at any public places like Mall, Hotel, Restaurant, on street etc. Our courier agent will make 2 more attempts to deliver the product in the absence of the recipient not available at the address during his first visit. In case the recipient is not reachable / available after these attempts, the product will be returned to our facility.

Any kind of discrepancy in the details of the receiver will result in non-delivery of product. Each order may be shipped only to a single destination address specified at the time of payment for that order. If you wish to ship products to different addresses, you shall need to place multiple orders. All our jewellery & Gift products are specially packaged in travel-safe, tamper-proof packing to ensure that the product reaches your hands in perfect condition. The courier agent will note down details of the recipient's identity proof. The receiver is expected to cooperate with the agent by providing with original copies of any of the identity proof for verification and OTP received on registered mobile number.

• Aadhaar Card

• Passport

• Driving License

• Voters ID

Shipping of the order from www.godachi.com is very safe, secure and hassle free. A tentative delivery time will be given along with the formal order confirmation email as soon as your order is ready for dispatch. Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an e-mail or SMS containing your tracking number to monitor the delivery status. The tentative delivery period can be consider 3-7 days depends on location, pin code, weather conditions and availability of courier services.
return_exchange_clause: Return request can be initiate within 7 days of delivery however the product should be in original condition, unused and Tag intact.
